{{Infobox character
| name = Razael
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = the Wolf, Judge
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Razael Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Razael, also known as the [[Wolf]], is a powerful [[Judge]] within the [[Abidan Court]]. A formidable combatant, she possesses enough strength to match [[Ozriel]] in open battle and is capable of depopulating an entire [[Iteration]]. Her specialized weapon, [[the Sword]] of Razael, is designed for the execution of Class One threats and other [[Judges]]. She leads the [[Wolf Division]], which utilizes various destructive powers that are not part of the public record. Razael is known for her intense presence on the battlefield, often remaining in combat for extended periods without leaving an [[Iteration]]. She has maintained a personal grudge against [[Ozriel]] since the establishment of his office and has expressed significant frustration with the [[Court]]'s leadership regarding decisions made without collective consultation. In past conflicts, such as a battle that led to the capture of [[Sunder]], she has overseen massive losses within her division.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Razael]] is known as the [[Wolf]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Razael]]'s [[Sword]] was designed for the execution of [[Judges]] and Class One threats.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Razael]] is a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Razael]] is a being that can match [[Makiel]] in combat.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Razael]] is a [[Judge]] known as the [[Wolf]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Razael]] clashed swords with [[the Mad King]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Razael]] is a [[Judge]] who can match [[Ozriel]] in open combat.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Razael]] wields a blazing [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Razael]] has fighters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
